progress.currentTopic: Pastel Patchboard project foundation, range humming, arrangement drag, and whole-song Canvas editor refined; product name remains open

use.value: create an original cute instrumental BGM from humming and guided assets without requiring music theory

tone.value: cute but not childish, dense but navigable, tactile composition workbench

designComparison.reason: fewer unnecessary circles and rounded corners; closer to owner preference

mainWorkbench.modelChoice: capability routed and disclosed, no same-purpose picker
mainWorkbench.projectStart: multi-project shelf with asset-first and humming-first creation
mainWorkbench.workspaces: project setup, assets, arrangement, melody; phase changes default surface and edit granularity
mainWorkbench.projectConditions: duration, mood, key, and BPM live in project creation and setup; AI-specific input is separate
mainWorkbench.arrangementRole: neutral frame shapes with distinct Break and Bridge; template insertion and pointer reorder; track role colours reserved for music layers
mainWorkbench.detailEditor: PPQ 480 whole-song Canvas 2D with viewport culling, note drag, resize, double-click add, and keyboard controls
mainWorkbench.assetAudition: one-tap Web Audio sample phrase in prototype

assumptions.status: provisional until user names the product
